tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
### Number of Service Tokens Issued


The number of service tokens issued, split by service.

This is useful for understanding token consumption by internal components or downstream systems.

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
### Unauthorized API Access Attempts

Tracks users or clients attempting to access protected APIs without providing a valid STS service token as authorization.

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
### Failed Authorization with Orchestration

Number of authorize requests to Orchestration that redirected with an error

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
### Invalid or Expired Session Access Attempts


Number of attempts to use expired, revoked or non-existent sessions (likely due to expired JWTS).

This can help track idle user behaviour or identify token expiration issues.

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
## Number of Pre-Authorized Codes Exchanged

Number of pre-authorized codes exchanged for CRI access tokens

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
### Login Success Rate

Percentage of STS authorization requests that result in successful issuance of an access token

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
### Refresh Token Success Rate

Percentage of successful requests to refresh a login access token

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
### Number of Auth requests, Auth Codes issued, Initial Access Tokens Issued

- Number of authorization requests to STS
- Number of auth codes issued
- Number of initial access tokens issued

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
### Number of Refresh Tokens Exchanged

Number of successful refresh token exchanges

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown: ### Authorize Success Rate (% of successful authorize requests to STS)

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown: ### Return to STS from Orchestration success rate (% of redirections back to STS from Auth)

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown: ### STS Redirect Success Rate (% of redirections back to the client from STS)

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown: ### Auth Code Exchange Rate (% of STS auth codes that are exchanged for an access token)

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
### Service Token Success Rate

Percentage of service token requests that are successful

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
### Pre-Authorized Code Exchange Success Rate

Percentage of pre-authorized code exchange requests that are successful.

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown:
### Token Call to Orchestration Failed

Number of failed requests to Orchestration's /token endpoint

tiles.name: Markdown
tiles.markdown: # --> Go right for Service Token Success Rate and Pre-Authorized Code Exchange Success Rate -->

tiles.name: Number of Auth requests, Auth Codes issued, Initial Access Tokens Issued
